creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 209457
libnormaliz - 3.8.3

3.8.3 is out and I update the patch.

Changelog:
"This is a purely technical realease that fixes an incompatibility between libnormaliz and PyNormaliz in version 3.8.2.

For binaries see 3.8.2."

Tested successfully with poudriere on {11.3,12.1}-RELEASE {i386,amd64}.
